headline: WST Stock Jumps on Q2 Earnings & Sales Beat, EPS View Up on HVP Growth
summary: WST tops Q2 earnings and revenue estimates, lifts its 2026 EPS outlook and sees shares surge as high-value products fuel strong growth.

headline: RH Announces the Appointment of Ryan Hassanein as Chief Legal & Compliance Officer
summary: CORTE MADERA, Calif., July 23, 2026--RH (NYSE: RH) announced today the appointment of Ryan Hassanein as Chief Legal & Compliance Officer.
